441552390: The Manhattan at Times Square Hotel
The Manhattan at Times Square Hotel

The Theater District is the teeming heart of Midtown West. In the pedestrian plazas of Times Square, costumed characters beckon to energetic crowds under the pulsing lights of towering digital billboards. Locals and tourists gather on the giant red staircase above the TKTS booth, which sells tickets to Broadway shows running at the areaâs historic theaters. On busy 42nd Street, chain stores and restaurants abound.
Bustling, brightly lit area with Broadway shows, chain restaurants, Times Square & 42nd Street.
Works from van Gogh to Warhol & beyond plus a sculpture garden, 2 cafes & The Modern restaurant.
Bustling destination in the heart of the Theater District known for bright lights, shopping & shows.
Iconic 19th-century lodging offering fine dining & afternoon tea, plus a champagne bar & a spa.
Iconic, art deco office tower from 1931 with exhibits & observatories on the 86th & 102nd floors.
Famous complex that's home to TV studios, plus a seasonal ice rink & a giant Christmas tree.
Iconic train station known for its grand facade & main concourse, also offering shops & dining.
A grand setting for one of the world's greatest collections of art, from ancient to contemporary.
Sprawling park with pedestrian paths & ballfields, plus a zoo, carousel, boat rentals & a reservoir.
Observatory on top of Rockefeller Center, with an ocean-liner style design, offering city views.
From dinosaurs to outer space & everything in between, this huge museum showcases natural wonders.
Popular park 30 feet above street level on an old rail line, with river & city views.
Frank Lloyd Wrightâdesigned modern art museum with an architecturally significant spiral rotunda.
Green space behind the NY Public Library's main branch, with 4 acres, a cafe and other food kiosks.
Towering Neo-Gothic church from 1879 with twin spires & storied history opposite Rockefeller Center.
Circa-1932 art deco theater hosting the Christmas Spectacular with the Rockettes, concerts & more.
Mangia 57th - Midtown Italian Food & Corporate Catering NYC
I Love NY by Phantom of Broadway
Store with wide stock of NYC souvenirs & apparel, including coffee mugs, hats, key chains & hoodies.

Times Square Hotel Near Broadway | The Manhattan at Times Square
Polished hotel offering streamlined rooms & suites, plus a marble-clad lobby lounge & a gym.
Built in 1962, this polished Midtown hotel with art-deco accents is 2 blocks from Radio City Music Hall, 5 blocks from Times Square and 8 blocks from Central Park.

The sleek rooms have Wi-Fi (surcharge), flat-screen TVs and coffeemakers, plus work desks with ergonomic chairs. Studios add living areas and private outdoor space, while 1-bedroom suites offer dining areas and extra bathrooms.
Amenities include a business center and a 24-hour gym. Breakfast is available in a marble lobby lounge.
